titleStmt.title: Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 5966

p.seg: To all sons of holy Mother Church to whom the present writing shall have come, Laurence, son of William son of Gocelin of Berwick, sends greeting.

for the salvation of my soul, my ancestors' and successors', to have given, granted, and by this my charter to have made firm, to God and the Church of St Æbbe at Coldingham, to Richard the Prior, and to the monks serving God in that place now and for ever in the future, one oxgang of land in the territory of Prenderguest of fortified land, namely, that oxgang of land towards the east which Haldane son of Waldef held, and fifteen acres of land which once belonged to the demesne of John of Neville, that is, six acres of land at Thornedales, two and a half acres of land at Backestanesrig, three and a half acres of land at Crumbedales, one and a half acres of land at Scortlandes, one acre of land at Lilliesaccre, and a half acre of land at Crumbedales; and these lands I had from the gift of my brother, Robert, who freely acquired them from John of Neville; for the said prior and monks of Coldingham and their successors to hold and to have, with all liberties and easements pertaining to the said lands, in free, pure, and perpetual alms, as freely and quitely in all things as any alms within the kingdom of Scotland is freely and quitely held or possessed.

As witnesses, the lord William of Mordington, the lord David of Haddington, the lord Ralph Noble, the lord William of Scremerston, Adam of Prenderguest, Adam son of John of Over Ayton, Thomas of Nisbet, Bertram of Reston, Patrick Scott, Gilbert of Lumsdaine, John son of Ingram, Gregory of Beoch, and others.
